emails.subject: FW: Recommendation for Chonawee Supatgiat?
emails.body: FW: Recommendation for Chonawee Supatgiat? Shirley, I shall be out on Thursday. Please, remind me about this. Vince To: Kaminski, Vince J

emails.subject: FW: Recommendation for Chonawee Supatgiat?
emails.body: FW: Recommendation for Chonawee Supatgiat? Shirley Another letter for Chonawee. Vince To: Kaminski, Vince J

emails.subject: FW: Recommendation for Chonawee Supatgiat?
emails.body: FW: Recommendation for Chonawee Supatgiat? Shirley, Did we send this one? Vince To: Kaminski, Vince J

emails.subject: RE: Recommendation for Chonawee Supatgiat?
emails.body: RE: Recommendation for Chonawee Supatgiat? Yes we did. To: Crenshaw, Shirley
